name: glow-effect
visual_summary: Glow-effect is a UI component that displays a colorful glow effect around its content. It can be used to draw the user's attention to a specific element on a webpage or provide a visual transition between different states. A developer would use this component to add a dynamic and engaging visual effect to their application.
generation_prompt:

Style: dynamic, colorful, eye-catching
Interactions: animated

- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
